description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named facebook/redex/build_main that runs on every pull request to main and stable branches, on push to main, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow should have a CACHE_VERSION env variable set to xxxxx1. It should have multiple jobs for building on different environments: ubuntu 20.04, ubuntu 22.04, windows-latest, and various debian environments with different clang versions. Each job should check out the repository and use custom actions for building and setting up the environment.
